title: The G Center — Identity, Love & Direction
description: This center governs identity, love & direction. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
topic: The G Center — Identity, Love & Direction
learningGoal: The viewer understands what the G center governs, and what it means for them when it is defined versus open — and feels recognised, not labelled.
keyPoints: This center governs identity, love & direction.
When defined: You have a strong, consistent sense of who you are, where you're going, and what love means to you.
When open: Your identity and sense of direction shift with your environment. Place matters — where you are determines who you become.
forbiddenClaims: a defined center is better, stronger, or more evolved than an open center
open centers are flaws or weaknesses to fix
you can or should change which of your centers are defined

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: The G Center — Identity, Love & Direction — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: The G Center — Identity, Love & Direction — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: The G Center — Identity, Love & Direction — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: The G Center — Identity, Love & Direction — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: The G Center — Identity, Love & Direction — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: This center governs identity, love & direction. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
